title: osbertia heleniastrum
intro: Osbertia heleniastrum, also known as the Heleniastrum osbeckia, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and red sepals. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Osbertia heleniastrum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
